departments.name: ACCOUNTING
departments.description: The Accounting department offers programs focused on financial reporting, auditing, and taxation.

departments.name: ARCHITECTURE
departments.description: The Architecture department emphasizes design, urban planning, and sustainable building techniques.

departments.description: Programs covering banking operations, investments, financial analysis, and corporate finance.

departments.description: Focused on biology teaching methods and laboratory skills for future educators.

departments.name: BUSINESS & MANAGEMENT
departments.description: Programs in business strategy, management principles, and organizational leadership.

departments.name: CIVIL
departments.description: Civil Engineering department covering infrastructure, construction, and structural design.

departments.name: CYBER SECURITY
departments.description: Specializes in network security, ethical hacking, and information protection techniques.

departments.name: PHARMACY
departments.description: Programs in drug formulation, pharmacology, and pharmaceutical sciences.

departments.name: DENTISTRY
departments.description: Covers oral health, dental treatments, and preventive dentistry.

departments.name: ENGLISH LANGUAGE TEACHING (ELT)
departments.description: Focuses on teaching English language skills to learners in diverse settings.

departments.name: INTERIOR DESIGN
departments.description: Interior design programs emphasize aesthetics, functionality, and spatial planning.

departments.name: INFORMATION TECHNOLOGIES (IT)
departments.description: Covers computing systems, software, and IT infrastructure management.

departments.name: INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS & DIPLOMACY
departments.description: Focuses on diplomacy, international law, and global political strategies.

departments.name: LAW
departments.description: Programs in civil, criminal, and corporate law with practical training.

departments.name: MEDICAL ANALYSIS
departments.description: Focuses on laboratory diagnostics and biomedical analysis.

departments.name: MATHEMATICS EDUCATION
departments.description: Prepares students to teach mathematics at various educational levels.

departments.name: MECHATRONICS

departments.name: PETROLEUM & MINING
departments.description: Covers petroleum extraction, mining engineering, and geosciences.

departments.name: PHYSICS EDUCATION
departments.description: Focuses on physics teaching methods and laboratory experiments.

departments.name: SURVEYING & GEOMETRICS
departments.description: Covers land surveying, mapping, and geometric measurement techniques.
